sentences.target: Je n'arrive pas à te joindre.

translations.fr: Je n'arrive pas à te joindre.
translations.ru: Я не могу с тобой связаться.
translations.pt: Não consigo entrar em contato com você.
translations.vi: Tôi không liên lạc được với bạn.
translations.uk: Я не можу з тобою зв’язатися.
translations.hi: मैं तुमसे संपर्क नहीं कर पा रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Nie mogę się z tobą skontaktować.
translations.el: Δεν μπορώ να επικοινωνήσω μαζί σου.
translations.nb: Jeg får ikke tak i deg.
translations.sv: Jag kan inte få tag på dig.
translations.ro: Nu reușesc să dau de tine.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke få fat på dig.
translations.ja: あなたに連絡が取れません。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; refers to the speaker and controls verb agreement.
Present 1st person singular of "arriver"; used in the construction "arriver à + infinitif" meaning 'manage to'. Includes attached negation clitic "ne" (n').
Negation adverb forming the standard "ne ... pas" negation with the verb.
Preposition introducing the infinitival complement ("à te joindre") of "arriver".
Unstressed 2nd person singular clitic object pronoun; direct object of "joindre"; placed before the infinitive.
Infinitive verb; here means 'to reach/contact (someone)'; complement of "arriver à".

sentences.target: Tu joins le fichier au mail.

translations.fr: Tu joins le fichier au mail.
translations.en: You're attaching the file to the email.
translations.de: Du hängst die Datei an die E-Mail.
translations.zh-Hans: 你把文件附在电子邮件里。
translations.pt: Você está anexando o arquivo ao e-mail.
translations.vi: Bạn đang đính kèm tệp vào email.
translations.nl: Je voegt het bestand toe aan de e-mail.
translations.uk: Ти додаєш файл до електронного листа.
translations.hi: तुम ईमेल में फ़ाइल संलग्न कर रहे हो.
translations.nb: Du legger ved filen i e-posten.
translations.ja: あなたはメールにファイルを添付しています。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; addresses one person informally.
Present 2nd person singular of "joindre"; here means 'to attach/append'; agrees with "Tu".
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun "fichier" as a specific item.
Masculine common noun; direct object of "joins".
Contraction of "à le"; preposition marking the target/association (the email) of the attachment.
Masculine common noun borrowed from English; object of the preposition "au" indicating destination.

sentences.target: Nous joignons la facture à la demande.
sentences.reading: /nu ʒwaɲɔ̃ la faktʏʁ a la dəmɑ̃d/

translations.fr: Nous joignons la facture à la demande.
translations.ipa: /nu ʒwaɲɔ̃ la faktʏʁ a la dəmɑ̃d/
translations.en: We attach the invoice to the application.
translations.es: Adjuntamos la factura a la solicitud.
translations.de: Wir fügen die Rechnung dem Antrag bei.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把发票附在申请上。
translations.yue: 我哋將發票附喺申請上。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đính kèm hóa đơn vào đơn đăng ký.
translations.nl: We voegen de factuur toe aan de aanvraag.
translations.hi: हम आवेदन के साथ चालान संलग्न करते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi legger ved fakturaen til søknaden.
translations.ja: 私たちは請求書を申請書に添付します。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun; marks inclusive subject and controls plural verb agreement.
Present 1st person plural of "joindre"; here 'attach/link'; agrees with "Nous".
Definite article, feminine singular (form of "le"); introduces the noun "facture".
Feminine common noun; direct object of "joignons".
Preposition linking the object attached to its target ("à la demande").
Definite article, feminine singular (form of "le"); introduces "demande".
Feminine common noun; object of the preposition "à" indicating the target of attachment.

sentences.target: On joint les tables pour le dîner.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʒwɛ̃ le tabl puʁ lə dine/

translations.fr: On joint les tables pour le dîner.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʒwɛ̃ le tabl puʁ lə dine/
translations.en: We're pushing the tables together for dinner.
translations.es: Juntamos las mesas para la cena.
translations.de: Wir schieben die Tische für das Abendessen zusammen.
translations.it: Accostiamo i tavoli per la cena.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们为晚餐把桌子拼在一起。
translations.pt: Juntamos as mesas para o jantar.
translations.he: אנחנו מצמידים את השולחנות לארוחת ערב.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ghép các bàn lại để ăn tối.
translations.nl: We schuiven de tafels voor het diner bij elkaar.
translations.uk: Ми зсуваємо столи докупи для вечері.
translations.hi: हम रात के खाने के लिए मेज़ों को साथ में लगा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ενώνουμε τα τραπέζια για το δείπνο.
translations.nb: Vi skyver bordene sammen til middag.
translations.id: Kami merapatkan meja untuk makan malam.
translations.sv: Vi skjuter ihop borden inför middagen.
translations.cs: Posouváme stoly k sobě na večeři.
translations.da: Vi skubber bordene sammen til middag.
translations.ja: 夕食のためにテーブルを寄せています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; often used colloquially for 'we'. Controls 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Present 3rd person singular of "joindre"; here means 'to put together/join'. Agrees with "On".
Definite article, plural form; introduces "tables" as a specific set.
Common noun, plural; direct object of "joint".
Preposition expressing purpose ('for the dinner').
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces "dîner".
Masculine common noun; object of the preposition "pour" indicating purpose.

Tu joins le fichier au mail.
Nous joignons la facture à la demande.
On joint les tables pour le dîner.
fu: /nu ʒwaɲɔ̃ la faktʏʁ a la dəmɑ̃d/
/ɔ̃ ʒwɛ̃ le tabl puʁ lə dine/

We attach the invoice to the application.
